business_hours: Monday to Friday, 8:00 AM to 6:00 PM MST. We're closed on weekends and federal holidays
emergency_definition: Any situation involving flooding, fire, gas leaks, no heat in winter, no AC when temperatures exceed 100°F, or a security breach at a property
emergency_routing_rules: Transfer to our on-call maintenance supervisor at extension 501. If they don't answer, try the backup number 303-555-0199
non_emergency_routing_rules: Take a detailed message including the property address and unit number, and schedule a callback for the next business day
call_transfer_rules: During office hours, transfer to the front desk at extension 100 first. If no answer, try the property manager on-call at extension 200
integration_constraints: We use AppFolio for property management. No direct API integration is needed for now — just standard call handling
after_hours_flow_summary: After hours: Greet caller, determine urgency, collect info, route emergencies or take messages for callbacks.
office_hours_flow_summary: Standard office hours protocol: greet caller, identify purpose, collect name and phone, transfer to appropriate party, fallback if unavailable.
notes: Tenants sometimes call about packages — we don't handle package tracking, so just let them know to contact their carrier directly.
